case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. HIRSCH, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIRSCH, LLC HIRSCH, JENS HIRSCH, PAMELA $15,796.90 PRINCIPAL, $1,925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $389.70 INTEREST, $405.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,516.60, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED THAT THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT : TEN ROTARY 10,000 SMART LIFT WITH 1-BAY; THREE FUTURE KITS FOR SL10 OR SL12 IS ENTITLED TO IMMEDIATE POSSESSION . THE PLAINTIFF OBTAINS POSSESSION AND SELL PROPERTY DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDITS. SEE SCANNED DOC
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
